rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies the logical inconsistency in the citation of Krishnapriyan et al. (2021) and proposes a revision.
rationale.R1.3: The agent accurately flags the overstated claim about Wang et al. (2022) and suggests softening the language.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty about its characterization of Krishnapriyan et al. (2021) and Wang et al. (2022), demonstrating transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's suggested revisions to the discussion paragraph are clear and concise, adhering to the scope of the study.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harm in the overclaiming of results and proposes a more cautious interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for each revision, including source and reason, demonstrating provenance and traceability.
